name: hermes-agent-team
author: Hayden
description: Local-first desktop and iOS control surface for coordinating Hermes agent teams.

scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project "ios/HermesAgentTeamMobile/HermesAgentTeamMobile.xcodeproj" -scheme HermesAgentTeamMobile -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath ios/DerivedData build
scripts.ios:test: xcodebuild -project "ios/HermesAgentTeamMobile/HermesAgentTeamMobile.xcodeproj" -scheme HermesAgentTeamMobile -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -derivedDataPath ios/DerivedData test
scripts.ios:launch:device: xcrun devicectl device process launch --device ${IOS_DEVICE_ID:-9E5A5EB0-AD0D-51DB-8BAB-E2D6AEDEDBBB} com.hayden.hermesagentteam.mobile --terminate-existing --timeout 30
scripts.ios:archive:unsigned: mkdir -p ios/build && xcodebuild -project "ios/HermesAgentTeamMobile/HermesAgentTeamMobile.xcodeproj" -scheme HermesAgentTeamMobile -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath ios/build/HermesAgentTeamMobile.xcarchive archive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.acceptance:dev: npm run build && HAT_ACCEPTANCE_APP_MODE=dev node scripts/acceptance.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run pack:mac && npm run acceptance:packaged
